description_long: This is a medium-sized, open-topped wooden barrel with a slightly polygonal shape and a dark brown finish. The exterior is adorned with swirling, carved wood grain patterns, giving it a rustic and decorative appearance. Two thick, metallic bands encircle the barrel near the top and bottom, serving as structural reinforcements and adding a silvery contrast to the dark wood. The rim of the barrel is uneven and jagged, suggesting damage or heavy use, and the interior appears hollow and empty. There are no visible handles or openings aside from the main top opening. The overall design suggests it is intended for storage or as a decorative urban object, likely found in outdoor or semi-public spaces.
description: A dark wooden barrel with carved patterns, reinforced by two metallic bands and an open, jagged top.
description_view_0: Front view showing the jagged opening, prominent wood grain patterns, and both metallic bands clearly.
description_view_1: Side view with the metallic bands visible and the wood grain patterns more subdued; jagged rim is still apparent.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with a clear look at the open top and the swirling wood grain, metallic bands in full view.
description_view_3: Rear view with the metallic bands and wood grain visible, and the jagged rim less pronounced.
attribute_banding_or_reinforcement: metal hoops at top and bottom
